hooks.command: echo 'CRITICAL RULES (post-compaction): Read .claude/rules/core.md for Rules 0-9. Domain rules auto-load from .claude/rules/ when editing matching files. Enforcement: types > guards > lints > hooks > rules > docs.'

echo '⛔ MANDATORY ENTRY POINT — NO EXCEPTIONS:
You MUST call Skill(general) FIRST before ANY other action.

FLOW:
1. Skill(general) → 两阶段确认 → 选择工具链或单独 skill
2. NEVER directly call specialized skills (brainstorming, debugging, etc.)
3. NEVER respond without going through general first

VIOLATION: Calling any skill other than general as the first skill is FORBIDDEN.'
